name: /pr-corpus-update --budget-override applies an operator-supplied cap in place of the default 100k per L-7
command: printf '%s' '{}' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --budget-override 50000 --estimated-tokens 10000 --budget b.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'effective_budget=50000' out.txt && grep -q 'override=operator' out.txt && echo overridden 1>&2
